```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: Correlate logs, traces, and metrics using shared identifiers.
---
Task:
Implement correlation IDs across service boundaries.
Requirements:
Ensure IDs propagate in requests, logs, and traces consistently.
Constraints:
Do not log sensitive payloads while correlating context.
Success Criteria:
Incidents can be traced end-to-end from a single identifier.
```
